channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Workers in Arizona don't have protections they need from triple-digit temperatures
item.description: Labor groups say Arizona isn't moving fast enough to establish new protections for people whose work exposes them to the state's sizzling high temperatures.
item.content:encoded: Labor groups say Arizona isn't moving fast enough to establish new protections for people whose work exposes them to the state's sizzling high temperatures.
item.dc:creator: Katherine Davis-Young

item.title: Airlines face headwinds as Iran war leads to rising fuel costs
item.description: Since the U.S. and Israel's war against Iran began, the impact on aviation has worsened. Jet fuel prices have soared. Thousands of European flights have been canceled, and one airline may stop flying.
item.content:encoded: Since the U.S. and Israel's war against Iran began, the impact on aviation has worsened. Jet fuel prices have soared. Thousands of European flights have been canceled, and one airline may stop flying.
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: DoJ drops Powell probe, paving the way to confirm Kevin Warsh
item.description: The Justice Department is dropping its investigation of Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell, paving the way for the Senate to confirm Kevin Warsh, President Trump's nominee to lead the Fed.
item.content:encoded: The Justice Department is dropping its investigation of Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell, paving the way for the Senate to confirm Kevin Warsh, President Trump's nominee to lead the Fed.
item.dc:creator: Maria Aspan

item.title: Noah Kahan pays homage to his hometown on 'The Great Divide'
item.description: Vermonter Noah Kahan reflects on his New England roots as he rises to stardom with new album The Great Divide. NPR's Scott Detrow speaks with Vermont Public's DJ Llu about the record.
item.content:encoded: Vermonter Noah Kahan reflects on his New England roots as he rises to stardom with new album The Great Divide. NPR's Scott Detrow speaks with Vermont Public's DJ Llu about the record.
item.dc:creator: Michael Levitt

item.title: Migrant workers in Dubai bear economic brunt of Iran war
item.description: Low-paid migrant workers in Dubai are being squeezed further by economic fallout from the U.S.-Israel war with Iran.
item.content:encoded: Low-paid migrant workers in Dubai are being squeezed further by economic fallout from the U.S.-Israel war with Iran.
item.dc:creator: Aya Batrawy

item.title: From night life in Egypt to rice farming in Vietnam, the war in Iran is a drain
item.description: Fuel costs more. Food is harder to get. Jobs are evaporating. And in Cairo, cafes and restaurants are ordered to close at 9 p.m.
item.content:encoded:
Fuel costs more. Food is harder to get. Jobs are evaporating. And in Cairo, cafes and restaurants are ordered to close at 9 p.m.

(Image credit: Ahmed Gomaa/Xinhua News Agency)
item.dc:creator: Fatma Tanis

item.title: Europe pushes back on reported U.S. plans to punish NATO allies
item.description: U.S. allies are pushing back after leaked email reveals Washington's frustration over their lack of support for the Iran war — and plans for retaliation.
item.content:encoded: U.S. allies are pushing back after leaked email reveals Washington's frustration over their lack of support for the Iran war — and plans for retaliation.
item.dc:creator: Teri Schultz

item.title: Vessels seized by the U.S. this week were part of a global 'shadow fleet'
item.description: NPR's Juana Summers speaks with Elisabeth Braw, senior fellow at the Atlantic Council, about shadow vessels, after the U.S. military's seizure of two Iranian-linked oil tankers.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Juana Summers speaks with Elisabeth Braw, senior fellow at the Atlantic Council, about shadow vessels, after the U.S. military's seizure of two Iranian-linked oil tankers.
item.dc:creator: Kathryn Fink

item.title: For Nikki Glaser, joking about thorny subjects is a practiced skill
item.description: NPR's Ailsa Chang talks with Nikki Glaser about her new comedy special on Hulu, Good Girl.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ailsa Chang talks with Nikki Glaser about her new comedy special on Hulu, Good Girl.
item.dc:creator: Ailsa Chang

item.title: Trump's week of battles and losses
item.description: President Trump campaigned on promises of victories on everything from the economy to foreign policy, but he has seen some major setbacks in recent weeks.
item.content:encoded: President Trump campaigned on promises of victories on everything from the economy to foreign policy, but he has seen some major setbacks in recent weeks.
item.dc:creator: Deepa Shivaram
